message:
feat(tests): add 30 property tests for model_selector and extension_inclusion

13 proptests for model_selector (full_id format, fuzzy_match invariants,
case insensitivity, query matching, scroll_offset bounds, select_next/prev
wrapping, next-prev roundtrip)

17 proptests for extension_inclusion (classify_registrations categories,
duplicates idempotence, serde roundtrips, build_rationale, canonicalize
idempotence/key sorting, normalize_manifest_value, SHA-256 hash properties
including determinism, key-order independence, generated_at stripping)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
